title: Lucky Seal Story
intro: By rubbing the lucky seal, you will get lucky too. Make sure to touch it before your final exams. This is actually a scientific fact.
Academic luck has been pumped into the SEAL by rubbing it against famous lucky objects.

images.title: Newton-Tree-2
images.description: Direct descendent of the Newton apple tree

images.title: George-Eastman
images.description: The bronze nose of George Eastman at MIT (students touch it for luck before exams)
